introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表型或数量性状在模型中的数值。

views.name: Mean
views.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
views.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。
views.formula_subsection: Application: Departure from Normality Under Truncation Selection

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean Trait Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The population average of the trait value across all classes or individuals.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 群体中性状值的平均水平。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The population average of fitness values.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 群体中适合度值的平均水平。

introduced_concepts.name: Imath-bar
introduced_concepts.definition: Imath-bar is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Imath-bar 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
introduced_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

introduced_concepts.name: Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

views.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mean
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Mean Fitness
introduced_concepts.definition: The population average of fitness values.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 群体中适合度值的平均水平。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of reproductive success or contribution to the next generation.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量个体繁殖成功或对下一代贡献的量。

views.name: Parameter Vector
views.definition: A collection of model parameters treated as one vector.
views.definition_zh: 把多个模型参数作为一个向量整体表示。

introduced_concepts.name: Change
introduced_concepts.definition: Change is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Change 是当前公式中使用的函数或算子，用来把输入量转换为模型需要的输出。

introduced_concepts.name: Parameter Vector
introduced_concepts.definition: A collection of model parameters treated as one vector.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把多个模型参数作为一个向量整体表示。

introduced_concepts.name: Mean
introduced_concepts.definition: The average value of a quantity in the relevant distribution or population.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 相关分布或群体中某个量的平均值。

introduced_concepts.name: Mean Fitness
introduced_concepts.definition: The population average of fitness values.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 群体中适合度值的平均水平。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: C
introduced_concepts.definition: C is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: C 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Distance
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of separation between states, values, or functions.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量状态、数值或函数之间分离程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: E
introduced_concepts.definition: E is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: E 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

introduced_concepts.name: L
introduced_concepts.definition: L is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: L 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

introduced_concepts.name: Count
introduced_concepts.definition: A discrete number of items, individuals, or events.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

views.name: Change
views.definition: Change is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
views.definition_zh: Change 是当前公式中使用的函数或算子，用来把输入量转换为模型需要的输出。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Cost
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Cost is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Cost 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Selection Differential
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The change in mean trait value caused by selection before transmission.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 选择作用在遗传传递之前造成的平均性状值变化。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Delta
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A local change or increment in the modeled quantity.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中某个量的局部变化或增量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Standard Deviation
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A square-root scale measure of spread around the mean.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 方差的平方根，用来表示分散程度的尺度。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Trait Variance
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Trait Variance is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: Trait Variance 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。
